items.scenario: You are a senior who joined the Riverside Athletic Club two months ago. You will be off campus for winter break from December 18 through January 8 and want to know whether your monthly membership can be paused without losing access to the swim team.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Castellano. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your travel dates and your current membership status.
Ask whether the gym offers a temporary pause option for travelers.
Suggest a partial credit if pausing is not available.
items.subject: Question about pausing my swim-team membership over winter break

items.scenario: You and your roommate Sam talked about driving up to the Lakeland trailhead over the upcoming three-day weekend. You found two campgrounds with availability and need to confirm cooking gear and meeting time before you book on Thursday evening.
items.direction: Write an email to Sam. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the two campground options you found.
Ask whether Sam can bring the stove and cooler.
Suggest a meeting time on Friday morning.
items.subject: Long weekend trip plan to the Lakeland trailhead

items.scenario: You moved into apartment 304 in Ashbury Hall three weeks ago. A slow leak under the kitchen sink began last Saturday and has now soaked through the wood cabinet floor. You want this fixed before the dampness damages your stored items.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Patel. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the leak and the damage observed so far.
Ask when a maintenance technician can inspect the unit.
Request a temporary container or absorbent mat until the repair.
items.subject: Persistent leak under the kitchen sink in apartment 304

items.scenario: You recently finished a six-week summer internship on Dr. Yamada's data-tools team and want to keep the working relationship open. You hope to learn whether there is a part-time fall role and to share a short summary of the projects you completed.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Yamada. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe two contributions you made during the internship.
Ask whether part-time roles are available this fall.
Offer to send a one-page summary of your work.
items.subject: Following up on next steps after my data-tools internship
